title: Graph browser read APIs
userStory: As a brainbot user, I want read APIs over the graph so that the browse/edit UI has the data it needs.
acceptanceCriteria: New file pwa/src/routes/api/graph/search/+server.ts: GET ?q=... returns hybrid search results (passes through to search_brain shape)
New file pwa/src/routes/api/graph/entity/[id]/+server.ts: GET returns entity attributes + one-hop neighbors + linked episodes
New file pwa/src/routes/api/graph/episode/[id]/+server.ts: GET returns full episode body + extracted entities + extraction status
New file pwa/src/routes/api/graph/recent/+server.ts: GET ?since=... returns chronological episode list (the feed view)
All four endpoints are read-only thin wrappers over Graphiti REST
Verify: each endpoint round-trips against the seeded graph and returns a non-empty response when given a known input
